text.title: cot-techniques Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cot-techniques as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Including the full CoT reasoning trace in the next turn's context in a multi-turn agent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: CoT traces bloat the context window rapidly. A 5-turn conversation with full traces can exceed 50K tokens. Strip or summarize traces between turns; the parent agent needs only the final answer.

failure-mode.description: Using self-consistency when all samples share the same systematic bias.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If the model has a consistent bias on a problem type, majority vote amplifies the wrong answer. Self-consistency assumes independent errors; correlated errors defeat it.
